g.title: four_axes_gradient_descent
g.text: Gradient Descent for Agents — four parameter spaces, one discipline
LDD as the optimizer navigating code (θ), deliverable (y), method (m), and reasoning chain (t).

g.title: cluster_scheduler
g.text: picked per task, before any gradient descends

g.title: cluster_inner
g.text: θ = code of the current task

g.title: cluster_refine
g.text: y = deliverable of a completed run

g.title: levels
g.text: 9-signal scorer → L0 reflex · L1 diagnostic · L2 deliberate · L3 structural · L4 method
sets k_max, reproduce_runs, max_refinement, mode, skill floor

g.text: contracts · layer boundaries · invariants · docs synced
